'''Breakman''' was a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] employed by the false [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Taxer Sundown]] on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] in [[37 BBY/Legends|37 BBY]]. Breakman was killed by [[Mantellian Savrip/Legends|savrips]] led by [[Mawkran]] as they assaulted Sundown's mountain retreat, which he was guarding together with fellow hired gun [[Crawley]] and others.

==Appearances==
*[[Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: Last Stand on Ord Mantell 3|''Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: Last Stand on Ord Mantell'' 3]] {{1stm}}
